title: Noctyrium
description: A dark fantasy RPG modpack combining Vampirism and other rpg mods into a challenging multi-realm adventure filled with exploration, progression, and powerful bosses.
body:
<details>
<summary>PT</summary>
  Noctyrium é um modpack para Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge que combina exploração profunda, construção criativa e combate desafiador. Desenvolvido para jogadores que procuram expandir a experiência base do jogo, oferece desde novos biomas, mobs e estruturas até sistemas avançados de magia, tecnologia e aventura. Cada mod foi cuidadosamente selecionado para enriquecer o mundo de Minecraft, mantendo a jogabilidade equilibrada e imersiva.
  
### Requisitos Mínimos:
Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.1 (NeoForge)
8 GB de RAM dedicados para o jogo
Processador quad-core ou superior
GPU compatível com OpenGL 4.5 ou superior
Espaço livre em disco: mínimo 10 GB
### Foco do Modpack:
Exploração e Aventuras: Com mods como Deeper and Darker, Dungeon Crawl, YUNG's Better Dungeons e Katters Structures, o mundo é repleto de masmorras, torres e biomas únicos para descobrir.

Magia e Poderes: Expande a jogabilidade com Ars Nouveau, Artifacts, Nature's Aura e Malum, oferecendo feitiços, rituais e habilidades únicas.

Tecnologia e Automação: Integra mods como Applied Energistics 2, Mekanism, Industrial Foregoing e Refined Storage para criar sistemas complexos de armazenamento e automação.

Personalização e Estética: FancyMenu, 3D Skin Layers, Accessories, Simple Hats e Supplementaries permitem aos jogadores personalizar visual e funcionalmente a sua experiência.

Sobrevivência Aprimorada: Com Waystones, AppleSkin, Traveler’s Backpack, Sophisticated Backpacks e TorchMaster, o modpack melhora a gestão de recursos e a sobrevivência em ambientes desafiantes.

Exploração do Mundo: Biomes O’ Plenty, Macaw’s mods, Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone, e The Aether acrescentam diversidade e beleza ao mundo, tornando cada viagem única.

Qualidade de Vida: Jade, Just Enough Items (JEI), Advanced Loot Info, Mouse Tweaks e Full Brightness Toggle melhoram a interface e a experiência do jogador.

Combate e Desafios: Vampirism, Werewolves, Epic Knights e Towers of the Wild Modded aumentam a dificuldade e proporcionam encontros emocionantes com inimigos poderosos.

### Mods Utilitários Adicionais
Este modpack inclui também o Iron Chests (GPLv3) para opções de armazenamento expandidas e o Flux Networks (Licença MIT) para gestão avançada de energia sem fios. Ambos os mods são utilizados de acordo com as respetivas licenças de código aberto, com todo o crédito atribuído aos seus autores originais.

  Noctyrium é ideal para jogadores que procuram um equilíbrio entre aventura, magia, tecnologia e exploração, criando um mundo vivo, dinâmico e cheio de oportunidades para construir, lutar e descobrir.
</details>
  Noctyrium is a modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 NeoForge that combines deep exploration, creative building, and challenging combat. Designed for players looking to expand the base game experience, it offers everything from new biomes, mobs, and structures to advanced systems of magic, technology, and adventure. Each mod has been carefully selected to enrich the Minecraft world while maintaining balanced and immersive gameplay.
  
### Minimum Requirements:
Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.1 (NeoForge)
8 GB of dedicated RAM for the game
Quad-core processor or better
GPU compatible with OpenGL 4.5 or higher
Free disk space: minimum 10 GB
### Modpack Focus:
Exploration and Adventure: With mods like Deeper and Darker, Dungeon Crawl, YUNG's Better Dungeons, and Katters Structures, the world is filled with dungeons, towers, and unique biomes to discover.

Magic and Powers: Expand gameplay with Ars Nouveau, Artifacts, Nature's Aura, and Malum, offering spells, rituals, and unique abilities.

Technology and Automation: Integrates mods like Applied Energistics 2, Mekanism, Industrial Foregoing, and Refined Storage to create complex storage and automation systems.

Customization and Aesthetics: FancyMenu, 3D Skin Layers, Accessories, Simple Hats, and Supplementaries allow players to customize their visual and functional experience.

Enhanced Survival: With Waystones, AppleSkin, Traveler’s Backpack, Sophisticated Backpacks, and TorchMaster, the modpack improves resource management and survival in challenging environments.

World Exploration: Biomes O’ Plenty, Macaw’s mods, Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone, and The Aether add diversity and beauty to the world, making every journey unique.

Quality of Life: Jade, Just Enough Items (JEI), Advanced Loot Info, Mouse Tweaks, and Full Brightness Toggle enhance the interface and player experience.

Combat and Challenges: Vampirism, Werewolves, Epic Knights, and Towers of the Wild Modded increase difficulty and provide exciting encounters with powerful enemies.

### Additional Utility Mods
This modpack also includes Iron Chests (GPLv3) for expanded storage options and Flux Networks (MIT License) for advanced wireless energy management. Both mods are used according to their respective open-source licenses, with full credit to their original authors.

  Noctyrium is ideal for players seeking a balance between adventure, magic, technology, and exploration, creating a lively, dynamic world full of opportunities to build, fight, and discover.
